krpano.action: showtooltip('hotspot');
pauseautorotation(forcehotspot);

hideTooltip();
resumeautorotation(forcehotspot);
showTooltip('hotspot');
hideTooltip();
removehotspot(%1);
set(layer[togglebutton].visible, false);
set(layer[togglebutton].visible, true);
ifnot (roundcornerbarbuilt, roundcornerbarbuildMenu(); set(roundcornerbarbuilt, true););
roundcornerbarshowMenuControls();
set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_sound_off].visible, false); set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_sound_on].visible , false);
set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_show_thumbnails].visible, false); set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_hide_thumbnails].visible, false);
set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_autorotate_off].visible, false); set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_autorotate_on].visible , false);

tween(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_openfs_bg].alpha, 0, 0.5, easeOutQuad, set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_openfs_bg].visible , false)); tween(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_closefs_bg].alpha, 0, 0.5, easeOutQuad, set(layer[roundcornerbarbtn_closefs_bg].visible , false));
set(hotspot[logo].visible, false);
set(hotspot[logo].visible, true);
set(tour_displaycontrols, false);events.dispatch(hidetourcontrols);
set(tour_displaycontrols, true); events.dispatch(showtourcontrols);
set(tour_displaythumbnails, false);events.dispatch(hidetourthumbnails);
set(tour_displaythumbnails, true); events.dispatch(showtourthumbnails);
if (xml.scene, if (scene[get(xml.scene)].haslocalsounds, playpanolocalsounds();););
if (xml.scene, if (scene[get(xml.scene)].haslocalsounds, stoppanolocalsounds();););
if (xml.scene, if (scene[get(xml.scene)].haslocalsounds, pausepanolocalsounds();););
if (xml.scene, if (scene[get(xml.scene)].haslocalsounds, setpanolocalsoundsvolume();););
set(tour_soundson, true);events.dispatch(playtoursoundsevent); resumeTourSoundsActions(true,true,true,true,true);
set(tour_soundson, false);events.dispatch(stoptoursoundsevent); pauseTourSoundsActions(true,true,true,true,true);
set(tour_soundsvolume, %1); set3DLocalSoundsVolume();
set(tour_fullscreen,false);set(fullscreen,false);
set(tour_fullscreen,true);set(fullscreen,true);
if(tour_fullscreen,exitFullScreen();,enterFullScreen(););
set(tour_fullscreen,false);events.dispatch(onexitfullscreen);
stopSetViewTweens(); setViewArchitecturalComplete();
stopSetViewTweens(); setViewNormalComplete();
